title: Functions should not have too many lines of code
description: Functions with excessive lines of code are hard to understand and maintain.
message: Function has too many lines of code.
recommendation: Break down the function into smaller, more manageable pieces.

noncompliant.code:
def nc_example():
    a = 1
    b = 2
    c = 3
    d = 4
    e = 5
    f = 6
    g = 7
    h = 8
    i = 9
    j = 10
noncompliant.description: Function with too many lines of code.

compliant.description: Function with a reasonable amount of lines.

why_is_this_an_issue: Functions with excessive lines of code are harder to understand, test, and maintain.
how_to_fix: Break down the function into smaller, more manageable pieces.

metadata.title: Functions should not have too many lines of code
